violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with orange biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The ceiling in the kitchen area is in poor repair, inspector observed several missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed orange biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen area is in poor repair, inspector observed several missing tiles throughout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Single-service articles (plastic cups) were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage room. Single-service articles must be stored at least 6 inches off the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

The floor in the ware-washing area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
